##RRUFFID=R060721
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=Fe^3+^_0.67_Fe^3+^_4_(SO_4_)_6_(OH)_2_·20H_2_O
##LOCALITY=Alcaparrosa mine, near Cerritos Bayos, El Loa Province, Chile
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=University of Arizona Mineral Museum
##DESCRIPTION=Yellow platy crystals associated with parabutlerite

##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated

##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
